1: -module(iguana_meta_guard_SUITE).
    2: -include_lib("common_test/include/ct.hrl").
    3: -include("iguana.hrl").
    4: 
    5: -export([all/0, init_per_suite/1, init_per_testcase/2, end_per_testcase/2]).
    6: -export([test_initial_state/1, test_domain_shift/1, test_unknown_domain/1, test_swarm_broadcast/1]).
    7: 
    8: all() ->
    9:     [test_initial_state, test_domain_shift, test_unknown_domain, test_swarm_broadcast].
   10: 
   11: init_per_suite(Config) ->
   12:     %% Ensure pg is started, ignore if already started
   13:     _ = application:start(pg),
   14:     Config.
   15: 
   16: end_per_testcase(_Case, _Config) ->
   17:     %% Clean up guards if any left
   18:     [gen_server:stop(W) || W <- pg:get_members(iguana_swarm)],
   19:     %% Stop meta guard if running
   20:     case whereis(iguana_meta_guard) of
   21:         undefined -> ok;
   22:         Pid -> gen_server:stop(Pid)
   23:     end,
   24:     ok.
   25: 
   26: init_per_testcase(_Case, Config) ->
   27:     {ok, _} = iguana_meta_guard:start_link(),
   28:     Config.
   29: 
   30: test_initial_state(_Config) ->
   31:     default = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain().
   32: 
   33: test_domain_shift(_Config) ->
   34:     %% We need at least one guard in the swarm to avoid errors during broadcast
   35:     {ok, GuardPid} = iguana_entropy_guard:start_link(),
   36:     
   37:     iguana_meta_guard:set_domain(medical),
   38:     %% Cast is asynchronous, wait a bit for processing
   39:     timer:sleep(100),
   40:     medical = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain(),
   41:     
   42:     %% Verify the guard received the threshold (medical => 1.8)
   43:     {ok, State} = iguana_entropy_guard:get_stats(GuardPid),
   44:     1.8 = State#state.entropy_threshold,
   45:     
   46:     gen_server:stop(GuardPid).
   47: 
   48: test_unknown_domain(_Config) ->
   49:     OldDomain = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain(),
   50:     iguana_meta_guard:set_domain(non_existent_domain),
   51:     timer:sleep(100),
   52:     %% Should keep the old domain
   53:     OldDomain = iguana_meta_guard:get_current_domain().
   54: 
   55: test_swarm_broadcast(_Config) ->
   56:     %% Test broadcasting to multiple guards
   57:     {ok, G1} = iguana_entropy_guard:start_link(),
   58:     {ok, G2} = iguana_entropy_guard:start_link(),
   59:     
   60:     iguana_meta_guard:set_domain(finance),
   61:     timer:sleep(100),
   62:     
   63:     {ok, S1} = iguana_entropy_guard:get_stats(G1),
   64:     {ok, S2} = iguana_entropy_guard:get_stats(G2),
   65:     
   66:     %% finance => 2.0
   67:     2.0 = S1#state.entropy_threshold,
   68:     2.0 = S2#state.entropy_threshold,
   69:     
   70:     gen_server:stop(G1),
   71:     gen_server:stop(G2).
